titleStmt.title: SII 26.135: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 135. (A.R. No. 127 of 1909.) KOMARALIṄGAM, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west and south bases of the Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple.

This inscription records the gift of land by the Brahmachchakravartti Śrīvallabhan Sundarabāhu-bhaṭṭa-sōmayāji of Bhāradvāja gōtra, belonging to Pullūr, for food offerings to the god Śiṅgapperumāḷ (i.e., Narasiṁha) set up in the temple of Kariyapirāṉ by him.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . ko Irājakesarivaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirarājentradevaṟkku yāṇṭu Irupatāvatu pullūr bhāradvāji śrīvallabhan sundarabāhu
bhaṭṭasomayājiyāṉa brahmaccakkaravattiyeṉ kariyapirāṉ koyilil nāṉ Ukantaruḷuvitta ciṅkapperumāḷukku Amutupaṭikku viṭṭa nilamāvatu śrīkraṣṇabhaṭṭa- somaiyājiyār kūṟu Itukkumel teṉvicai jagatiile vācikku
Āḷuṭaiyāṉ bhaṭṭassomaiyājiyārkup pattāvatu tai(m)māsattu Āṭṭait tiru nāḷile perumāḷ dāṉampaṇṇiṉa nilamāvatu vīrakeraḷavaḷanāṭṭu Ariyavai ceyta coḻaccaturvedimaṅkalattilum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻanallūrilum tūṇṭiyil vāḻavantāṉai
perumāḷ paṇṭāramāṉamaiyil Avaṉṉilaṅkaḷil Ivarkaḷukku dāṉam paṇṇiṉa nilamiraṇṭu māvukku nāṉkellaiyāvatu viranārāyaṇa brahmādhirājaṉ nilattukku meṟkum Uttamacoḻabrahmādhirājaṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum tevatāṉakkaṇṇāṟṟukkaṭaiyil vaṭakku nokkippoṉa ko kiḻakkum nilai
uṭaiccoḻa brahmādhirājaṉ nilattukkut teṟkum Iṉṉān kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam Oru māvaraiyil teṟkaṭaiya nilam muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu nilamorumāvukku nāṉkellaiyāvatu perumāḷ ṉilattukku meṟku Im muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakku veḷḷampokikkavarukkuk kiḻakku nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu ṉnāṉkellaikku
ḷpaṭṭa nilamorumāvum Āka nilamiraṇṭumāvukkum Iṟai puravu siddhāya melavai Ukavai maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭanavum Iṟātārkaḷākavum Iṉnilamivarkaḷiḻakka E kkarukku vilaipoṟṟi dhanmadānasatridhanattukku muriccāvatākavumRead murittāvatākavum • dānam paṇṇi tiruveḻut tiṭṭa tirumukamuṅkuṭuttaruḷiṉamaiyil Iśrīkṛūṣṇa bhaṭṭasomaiyājiyār pakkalum Ivvāḻvuṭai
yāṉ bhaṭṭassomaiyājiyār pakkalum nāṉ vilaikoṇṭu ciṅkapperumāḷukku Amutupaṭippuṟamāka viṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭumāvum vaikāviṉāṭṭu brahmadeyamśrīadhirādhirājaccaturvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyārum Iraṭṭaiyampāṭi yūrārum pūluvvūrārum Ivvūrkku paṇṇiṉa tirumāldāmodarabhaṭṭa
rkku dāṉam paṇṇiṉa Iṟaiyili nilam Araimāvukku nāṉkellaiyāvatu veṇkalamaṉṉāṟaiyil vaṭakku nokkippoṉa koṇṭoṭikku meṟku kuraṅkuṇṇikkup poṉa vaḻivatikku vaṭakku Araimākkūṟṟukkuk kiḻakkuk kuṇṭūr perumāḷ nilattukkum kāvaṉkāvaṉilattukkun teṟku Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilam A
raimāvukkum vanta Iṟai puravu siddhāyam Elavai yukavai maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Ivarkaḷ tāṅkaḷe Iṟuppārkaḷāki Iddāmodarabhaṭṭaṟk kuttaṅkaḷ Olaiyumeḻuttiṭṭuk kuṭuttu Iṟaiyiliyāka dāṉam paṇṇikkuṭutta Iṉṉilam Araimāvum nāṉ Iddāmodarabhaṭṭar pakkal vilaikoṇṭu
ciṅkapperumāḷukku Amutupaṭippuṟamāka viṭṭa nilam māvum Iṉṉilam Irumāvarai Amutuppuṟamāka candrādittavaṟ celvatāka Iṉṉilaṅkaḷil ciṅkapperumāḷukku tiru śrīkariyapirāṉ śrīpaṇṭāra
Digital edition of SII 26.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
